navigation_overview: Parabank is a sample banking application. When visitors arrive, they see the sign-in page, which offers an Email / Username and Password form, a Register link for new customers, and a Forgot Password? link for credential recovery. After a successful log-in, users reach their account dashboard displaying every account and balance. The left-hand navigation menu now contains the following options: ① Accounts Overview (default dashboard view), ② Open New Account, ③ Transfer Funds, ④ Bill Pay, ⑤ Request Loan, ⑥ Update Contact Info, ⑦ Manage Cards, ⑧ Investments, ⑨ Account Statements, ⑩ Security Settings, ⑪ Support Center, and ⑫ Log Out.

module_summaries.summary:
Line 1: Users can submit their Email/Username and Password to sign in or open the Forgot Password flow.
Line 2: Shows input validation hints, authentication success/failure messages and password requirement errors.

Line 1: Users can register a new account by submitting personal, contact and credential information.
Line 2: Shows field-level validation feedback, automatic phone/ZIP formatting hints and a registration success/ error message.

Line 1: Users can view a dashboard list of all customer accounts and (optionally) interact with account rows.
Line 2: Shows a welcome message, masked account numbers, account type, current balance, status badges, open dates and footer total balance.

Line 1: Users can open a new Checking or Savings account by selecting account type, entering an initial deposit and choosing a funding source.
Line 2: Shows account type features and minimums, real-time deposit and funding-account validation, funding account balances and success/failure messages.

Line 1: Users can initiate internal or external transfers by selecting transfer type, source account, destination and transfer amount.
Line 2: Shows filtered source accounts (Checking/Savings), destination entry or selection, validation errors, sufficient-funds checks and transfer confirmations.

Line 1: Users can submit bill payments by entering payee details, account numbers, payment amount and source account.
Line 2: Shows payee and account details, account-number match validation, available funds check, payment reference code and updated balances or error messages.

Line 1: Users can apply for Personal, Auto or Home loans by selecting loan type and entering loan amount, down payment and collateral account.
Line 2: Shows loan-type interest rates, allowed amount ranges, down payment/collateral validations, simulated credit decision and approval/denial messages.

Line 1: Users can edit and update their contact information fields and submit profile changes.
Line 2: Shows pre-filled current contact data, field-level validation errors and profile update success or failure messages.

Line 1: Users can request new debit/credit cards and manage existing cards (set limits, add travel notices, freeze/unfreeze) via separate forms.
Line 2: Shows card types, linked accounts, shipping address validation, existing card list, card status and request tracking IDs or control update confirmations.

Line 1: Users can view their investment portfolio snapshot and execute buy/sell trades by specifying fund symbol, quantity and funding/destination account.
Line 2: Shows current fund holdings, market value, unrealised gain/loss, fund symbol autocomplete results and trade validation/confirmation messages.

Line 1: Users can generate account statements for a given month or custom date range and manage e-statement preferences.
Line 2: Shows retrieved transactions for the selected period, statement generation status messages and current paperless/email preference.

Line 1: Users can change their password by entering current and new passwords and submitting the form.
Line 2: Shows current-password verification results, strong-password validation feedback and success/error messages for the update.

Line 1: Users can send secure messages to support or request a callback by submitting message details or callback preferences.
Line 2: Shows subject/category validation, attachment validation, ticket ID on success and scheduled callback confirmation or error guidance.

test_cases.title: Sign in with registered email
test_cases.workflow: Submit the form to securely validate the provided credentials against the registered-user database
test_cases.preconditions: User exists with registered email and password.
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username with registered email, Password with valid password)
test_cases.expected_result: The system flashes "Signed in successfully." and redirects the user to the Accounts Overview page.

test_cases.title: Sign in with registered username
test_cases.workflow: Submit the form to securely validate the provided credentials against the registered-user database
test_cases.preconditions: User exists with registered username and password.
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username with registered username, Password with valid password)
test_cases.expected_result: The system flashes "Signed in successfully." and redirects the user to the Accounts Overview page.

test_cases.title: Sign in with incorrect credentials clears password and shows error
test_cases.workflow: Submit the form to securely validate the provided credentials against the registered-user database
test_cases.preconditions: An active registered user exists.
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username with registered email, Password with incorrect password)
test_cases.expected_result: The system shows the authentication error message, clears the password field, and allows another attempt.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Incorrect email or password. Please try again,

test_cases.title: Sign in with password exactly at minimum required length and complexity
test_cases.workflow: Submit the form to securely validate the provided credentials against the registered-user database
test_cases.preconditions: User exists with a password that exactly satisfies the minimum complexity and length requirements.
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username with registered email, Password that exactly meets the minimum length and complexity)
test_cases.expected_result: Authentication succeeds: the system flashes "Signed in successfully." and redirects the user to the Accounts Overview page.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

test_cases.title: Post-logout redirect to login when revisiting an authenticated page
test_cases.preconditions: A valid user account exists and tester can log in; tester knows the URL of a protected page (e.g., Accounts Overview).
steps: Log in with a valid user account.
Navigate to a protected page (e.g., Accounts Overview) and note the URL.
In the browser address bar, paste the previously noted protected-page URL and press Enter.
test_cases.expected_result: The app redirects to the login page (or shows the login form) instead of displaying the protected content.

test_cases.title: Browser back button after logout does not restore authenticated content
test_cases.preconditions: A valid user account exists and tester can log in; tester is using a standard desktop or mobile browser.
steps: Log in with a valid user account and navigate to a protected page (e.g., Transfer Funds).
Click the application's Logout control to end the session.
Use the browser Back button to attempt to return to the protected page.
test_cases.expected_result: The protected page is not restored; the browser either shows the login page or an unauthenticated notice and no cached sensitive data is visible.

test_cases.title: Session expiry during form entry forces re-authentication or shows expiry notice
test_cases.preconditions: A valid user account exists and tester can log in; tester can start filling a multi-step form on a protected page (e.g., Transfer Funds).
steps: Log in with a valid user account and navigate to a form on a protected page (e.g., Transfer Funds).
Begin filling the form, then simulate session expiry by either waiting the configured timeout or using developer tools to delete/expire the session cookie/token.
Attempt to submit the form after the session has been expired.
test_cases.expected_result: The application prevents the submission and either displays a session-expired message prompting re-login or redirects the user to the login page before accepting the submission.

test_cases.title: After changing password, the old password no longer authenticates
test_cases.preconditions: A valid user account exists and tester knows current credentials; password-change feature accessible from an authenticated session.
steps: Log in with the current credentials and navigate to the Change Password page.
Change the password to a new value and confirm success, then log out.
Attempt to log in using the old password, then attempt to log in using the new password.
test_cases.expected_result: Login with the old password is rejected and shows an authentication error; login with the new password succeeds.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.workflow: Submit the form to securely validate the provided credentials against the registered-user database
test_cases.preconditions: None
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Email/Username is required

test_cases.title: Sign in with invalid email format
test_cases.workflow: Submit the form to securely validate the provided credentials against the registered-user database
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username with an invalid email format, Password with valid password)
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the email format is invalid and sign-in is not attempted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Email must be a valid email format

test_cases.title: Sign in with password shorter than minimum length
test_cases.workflow: Submit the form to securely validate the provided credentials against the registered-user database
test_cases.preconditions: User exists with registered email.
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username with registered email, Password shorter than the required length)
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the password does not meet the required length/complexity and sign-in is not performed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

test_cases.title: Page refresh on an authenticated page preserves login state
test_cases.preconditions: A valid user account exists and tester can log in.
steps: Log in with a valid user account and navigate to a protected page (e.g., Account Statements).
Click the browser's Reload/Refresh button or press F5.
test_cases.expected_result: The user remains authenticated after the refresh and the protected content is visible without being redirected to login.

test_cases.title: Password reset link shows error when used after its expiration
test_cases.preconditions: Password reset functionality is enabled; tester can request and obtain reset links (via email/logs/test inbox).
steps: On the login page, initiate a password reset for a valid account and obtain the reset link from the test inbox or email logs.
Wait until the stated expiration period has passed (or manipulate the token to simulate an expired timestamp), then open the reset link in the browser.
test_cases.expected_result: The application rejects the expired reset link and displays a clear error message indicating the link has expired and prompting to request a new reset.

test_cases.title: Forgot-password shows clear error for an unregistered email
test_cases.preconditions: Password reset page is accessible from the login screen.
steps: From the login page, click 'Forgot Password' (or equivalent) to open the password reset form.
Enter an email address that is not registered in the system and submit the reset request.
test_cases.expected_result: The application returns a clear, user-visible error indicating the email is not associated with an account (not a silent success), or presents a message explaining the address is unrecognized and guidance to proceed.

test_cases.title: Register with all valid required fields
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values (First Name, Last Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code in allowed format, Phone Number, Social Security Number, Username as a valid email, Password meeting length requirement, Confirm Password matching Password)
test_cases.expected_result: Account created successfully message shown and user is redirected to the login page.

test_cases.title: Phone number auto-formats on entry
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values
Enter phone number as digits only into Phone Number field and move focus out of the field
test_cases.expected_result: Phone Number is automatically formatted to (123) 456-7890 on the form.

test_cases.title: SSN auto-formats on entry
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values
Enter SSN as digits only into Social Security Number field and move focus out of the field
test_cases.expected_result: SSN is automatically formatted to 123-45-6789 on the form.

test_cases.title: Register using 5+4 ZIP code format
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values using a ZIP Code in 5+4 format
test_cases.expected_result: Account created successfully message shown and user is redirected to the login page.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: System validates field completeness, pattern conformance, and password match on submission

test_cases.title: Submit with First Name empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave First Name empty
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating First Name is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: First Name is required

test_cases.title: Submit with Last Name empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave Last Name empty
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Last Name is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Last Name is required

test_cases.title: Submit with Street Address empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave Street Address empty
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Street Address is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Street Address is required

test_cases.title: Submit with City empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave City empty
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating City is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: City is required

test_cases.title: Submit with State empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave State unselected
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating State is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: State is required

test_cases.title: Submit with ZIP Code empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave ZIP Code empty
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating ZIP Code is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: ZIP Code is required

test_cases.title: Submit with Phone Number empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave Phone Number empty
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Phone Number is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Phone Number is required

test_cases.title: Submit with Social Security Number empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave Social Security Number empty
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Social Security Number is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Social Security Number is required

test_cases.title: Submit with Username empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave Username empty
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Username is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Username is required

test_cases.title: Submit with Password empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave Password empty
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Password is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Password is required

test_cases.title: Submit with Confirm Password empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave Confirm Password empty
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Confirm Password is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Confirm Password is required

test_cases.title: Register with invalid email format for Username
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values except enter an invalid email format into Username
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Username must be a valid email format.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Username must be a valid email format

test_cases.title: Register with invalid phone number format
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values except enter a phone value that does not conform to the expected digits/format
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Phone Number must follow the required format.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Phone Number must follow the format (123) 456-7890 with automatic formatting

test_cases.title: Register with invalid ZIP Code format
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values except enter a ZIP Code that is not 5 digits or 5+4 format
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating ZIP Code must use the accepted format.
test_cases.spec_evidence: ZIP Code must be 5 digits or 5+4 format (12345 or 12345-6789)

test_cases.title: Register with invalid SSN format
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values except enter an SSN that does not conform to required digits/format
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating SSN must follow the required format.
test_cases.spec_evidence: SSN must follow the format 123-45-6789 with automatic formatting

test_cases.title: Register with password shorter than minimum length
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values except enter a Password shorter than the minimum length and set Confirm Password to the same short value
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Password must meet the minimum length requirement.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Password must be at least 8 characters

test_cases.title: Register with mismatched Password and Confirm Password
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values but enter a different value in Confirm Password than in Password
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Confirm Password must match Password.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Confirm Password must match the Password field

test_cases.title: Register with Password at minimum length boundary
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values using a Password that is exactly the minimum allowed length and set Confirm Password to match
test_cases.expected_result: Account created successfully and user is redirected to the login page.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Password must be at least 8 characters

test_cases.title: Accounts overview displays welcome message and account listing
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview (dashboard) is open.
steps: Verify the welcome message displays the user's name
Verify the accounts table is present and each row shows Account Number, Account Type, Current Balance, Account Status (Active badge), and Open Date
test_cases.expected_result: Welcome message shows the user's name and the accounts table displays the listed columns for each account.

test_cases.title: Footer displays total balance equal to sum of account balances
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview (dashboard) is open.
steps: Read the Current Balance value from each account row and compute their sum
Compare the computed sum to the total balance displayed in the table footer row
test_cases.expected_result: Footer row displays a total balance equal to the sum of all Current Balance values shown in the rows.

test_cases.title: Rows are ordered by account creation date (earliest first)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview (dashboard) is open.
steps: Collect the Open Date value from each account row in displayed order
Verify the sequence of Open Date values is ordered earliest first
test_cases.expected_result: Account rows are displayed in ascending order by Open Date (earliest account first).

test_cases.title: Account numbers are displayed masked showing only last four digits
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview (dashboard) is open.
steps: Inspect the Account Number field in multiple account rows
Verify each displayed account number shows only the last four digits and preceding characters are masked
test_cases.expected_result: Each account number on the dashboard is masked, revealing only the last four digits.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Account numbers are masked for security (showing only last 4 digits as ****5001)

test_cases.title: Direct URL access while logged out redirects to login (Accounts Overview)
test_cases.preconditions: Tester is logged out (fresh browser session) and knows the Accounts Overview entry URL.
steps: Ensure you are logged out (clear cookies or open a private window).
Enter the Accounts Overview page URL directly in the browser address bar and press Enter.
test_cases.expected_result: The app redirects to the login page (or displays the login form) instead of showing the Accounts Overview content.

test_cases.title: Clicking an Account Number has no implemented detail navigation
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview (dashboard) is open.
steps: Click the Account Number link in a visible account row
Observe the page behavior after the click
test_cases.expected_result: Clicking the Account Number does not navigate to an account detail page (no detail view is opened) or a not-implemented indication is shown.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Account Number (clickable but not implemented yet)

test_cases.title: Open a new Checking account with a valid initial deposit
test_cases.preconditions: A funding source account has sufficient balance.
steps: Select the Checking account type card
Fill all required fields (Initial Deposit Amount with an amount equal to or above the Checking minimum, Funding Source Account selecting an account with sufficient balance)
test_cases.expected_result: Success shows "Account opened successfully!" and Success redirects to accounts overview; the new Checking account appears in the accounts listing.

test_cases.title: Open a new Savings account with a valid initial deposit
test_cases.preconditions: A funding source account has sufficient balance.
steps: Select the Savings account type card
Fill all required fields (Initial Deposit Amount with an amount equal to or above the Savings minimum, Funding Source Account selecting an account with sufficient balance)
test_cases.expected_result: Success shows "Account opened successfully!" and Success redirects to accounts overview; the new Savings account appears in the accounts listing.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validation errors are displayed in real-time

test_cases.title: Submit with Account Type not selected
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave Account Type unselected
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the account type is required and the account is not opened.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Account type must be selected

test_cases.title: Enter non-numeric Initial Deposit Amount
test_cases.preconditions: A funding source account has sufficient balance.
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values
Enter a non-numeric value into the Initial Deposit Amount field
test_cases.expected_result: Real-time validation error indicating the deposit must be numeric is shown and submission is blocked.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Initial Deposit Amount must be numeric

test_cases.title: Reject initial deposit below the Checking minimum
test_cases.preconditions: A funding source account has sufficient balance.
steps: Select the Checking account type card
Fill all other required fields with valid values and enter an amount below the Checking minimum in Initial Deposit Amount
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the initial deposit does not meet the required minimum is shown and the account is not opened.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Initial Deposit Amount must meet minimums ($25 for Checking, $100 for Savings)

test_cases.title: Reject initial deposit below the Savings minimum
test_cases.preconditions: A funding source account has sufficient balance.
steps: Select the Savings account type card
Fill all other required fields with valid values and enter an amount below the Savings minimum in Initial Deposit Amount
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the initial deposit does not meet the required minimum is shown and the account is not opened.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Initial Deposit Amount must meet minimums ($25 for Checking, $100 for Savings)

test_cases.title: Reject open request when funding source has insufficient balance
test_cases.preconditions: A funding source account has insufficient balance.
steps: Fill all required fields with a valid initial deposit amount greater than the funding account balance and select the insufficient funding source
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the funding source does not have sufficient balance is shown and the account is not opened.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Funding Source Account must have sufficient balance

test_cases.title: Open Checking account with initial deposit exactly at the minimum
test_cases.preconditions: A funding source account has sufficient balance.
steps: Select the Checking account type card
Fill all required fields (Initial Deposit Amount equal to the Checking minimum, Funding Source Account selecting an account with sufficient balance)
test_cases.expected_result: Success shows "Account opened successfully!" and Success redirects to accounts overview; the new Checking account appears in the accounts listing.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Initial Deposit Amount must meet minimums ($25 for Checking, $100 for Savings)

test_cases.title: Open Savings account with initial deposit exactly at the minimum
test_cases.preconditions: A funding source account has sufficient balance.
steps: Select the Savings account type card
Fill all required fields (Initial Deposit Amount equal to the Savings minimum, Funding Source Account selecting an account with sufficient balance)
test_cases.expected_result: Success shows "Account opened successfully!" and Success redirects to accounts overview; the new Savings account appears in the accounts listing.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Initial Deposit Amount must meet minimums ($25 for Checking, $100 for Savings)

test_cases.title: Perform internal transfer between own accounts successfully
test_cases.workflow: Perform internal transfer (select from their own accounts)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Transfer Funds page is open.
steps: Select the 'My ParaBank Account' transfer type radio button
Fill all required fields (choose Source Account, choose Destination Account from user's own accounts, enter a valid Transfer Amount within available balance)
test_cases.expected_result: Displays "Transfer completed successfully." and a transaction ID.

test_cases.title: Perform external transfer with valid account numbers and sufficient funds
test_cases.workflow: Perform external transfer (enter and confirm the account number)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and has at least one Checking or Savings account with sufficient balance
steps: Select the radio option for 'External Account' transfer type

Fill all required fields (Source Account: select a Checking or Savings account, Transfer Amount: enter an amount within available balance, External Account Number: enter valid account number, Confirm Account Number: enter the same account number)
test_cases.expected_result: 'Transfer completed successfully.' message is shown and a transaction ID is displayed

test_cases.title: Transfer fails when source account has insufficient funds
test_cases.workflow: Perform internal transfer (select from their own accounts)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Transfer Funds page is open and the selected source account balance is less than the intended transfer amount.
steps: Select the source account with insufficient balance and select a valid destination account
Enter a Transfer Amount greater than the source account's available balance
test_cases.expected_result: Contextual error indicating insufficient funds is displayed and the transfer is not processed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates sufficient funds

test_cases.title: Fail transfer when external account numbers do not match
test_cases.workflow: Perform external transfer (enter and confirm the account number)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and has at least one Checking or Savings account
steps: Fill all other required fields correctly (Source Account, Transfer Amount), enter an external account number and a different Confirm Account Number
test_cases.expected_result: Error 'Account numbers do not match.' is displayed and the transfer is not processed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Account numbers do not match.

test_cases.title: Destination options update when transfer type toggled
test_cases.workflow: Perform internal transfer (select from their own accounts)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Transfer Funds page is open.
steps: Select the 'My ParaBank Account' transfer type radio button
Verify destination options allow selecting from the user's own accounts
Select the 'External Account' transfer type radio button
Verify destination input changes to accept external account details
test_cases.expected_result: Destination options change based on transfer type.

test_cases.title: Source Account dropdown shows only Checking and Savings accounts
test_cases.workflow: Perform internal transfer (select from their own accounts)
test_cases.preconditions: User has multiple accounts of different types.
steps: Verify only Checking and Savings accounts are listed as selectable options
test_cases.expected_result: Source Account dropdown is filtered to Checking and Savings accounts only.

test_cases.title: Destination options update when switching to External Account transfer type
test_cases.workflow: Perform external transfer (enter and confirm the account number)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in
steps: Select the radio option for 'External Account' transfer type
Observe that destination inputs update to show external-specific options (External Account Number and Confirm Account Number fields)
test_cases.expected_result: Destination options change based on transfer type and external account fields are displayed

test_cases.title: Source Account dropdown shows only Checking and Savings accounts
test_cases.workflow: Perform external transfer (enter and confirm the account number)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and has multiple account types
test_cases.expected_result: Source Account dropdown filtered to Checking and Savings accounts only

test_cases.title: Submit transfer with all required fields empty
test_cases.workflow: Perform internal transfer (select from their own accounts)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Transfer Funds page is open.
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates transfer amount

test_cases.title: Transfer fails with invalid amount format
test_cases.workflow: Perform internal transfer (select from their own accounts)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Transfer Funds page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields, entering a non-numeric or improperly formatted value into the Transfer Amount field
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating invalid transfer amount format is displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates transfer amount

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.workflow: Perform external transfer (enter and confirm the account number)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: For external transfers, users enter and confirm the account number

test_cases.title: Submit with Confirm Account Number empty for external transfer
test_cases.workflow: Perform external transfer (enter and confirm the account number)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in
steps: Fill all other required fields, leave Confirm Account Number empty
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating account number confirmation is required and the transfer is not processed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates account number matching for external transfers

test_cases.title: Submit payment with valid details and sufficient funds
test_cases.preconditions: Source account has sufficient available funds.
steps: Fill all required fields (Payee Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code, Phone Number, Payee Account Number, Confirm Account Number, Payment Amount, Source Account) ensuring Payee Account Number and Confirm Account Number match and Payment Amount is within available funds
test_cases.expected_result: Payment submitted successfully with a reference code and the source account balance is updated.

test_cases.title: Form remains editable after validation errors and allows retry
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with an input that triggers a validation error (for example, mismatched account numbers)
Correct the invalid field(s) so all validations pass, then click "Pay" again
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error displayed after the first attempt, the form remains editable, and after correction the payment submits successfully with a reference code and balances update.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields and errors displayed inline.
test_cases.spec_evidence: All entries are validated

test_cases.title: Submit payment with mismatched account numbers
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields, set Payee Account Number and Confirm Account Number to different values
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error shown stating the account numbers do not match and the form remains editable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Account numbers do not match

test_cases.title: Submit payment equal to available funds (boundary case)
test_cases.preconditions: Source account available funds equal the Payment Amount.
steps: Fill all required fields with Payment Amount equal to the source account's available funds and matching account numbers
test_cases.expected_result: Payment submitted successfully with a reference code and the source account balance becomes zero.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Available funds are checked before executing the payment

test_cases.title: Request Personal loan successfully (approved by credit engine)
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields (Loan Amount within Personal range, Down Payment meeting minimum percentage and less than Loan Amount, select Collateral Account with sufficient funds)
test_cases.expected_result: Displays "Loan approved and created successfully!" and shows new loan account details.

test_cases.title: Request Auto loan successfully (approved by credit engine)
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields (Loan Amount within Auto range, Down Payment meeting minimum percentage and less than Loan Amount, select Collateral Account with sufficient funds)
test_cases.expected_result: Displays "Loan approved and created successfully!" and shows new loan account details.

test_cases.title: Request Home loan successfully (approved by credit engine)
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields (Loan Amount within Home range, Down Payment meeting minimum percentage and less than Loan Amount, select Collateral Account with sufficient funds)
test_cases.expected_result: Displays "Loan approved and created successfully!" and shows new loan account details.

test_cases.title: Loan denied by credit engine shows insufficient credit history reason
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields (Loan Amount within allowed range, Down Payment meeting minimum percentage and less than Loan Amount, select Collateral Account with sufficient funds) and submit in a way that triggers credit engine denial
test_cases.expected_result: Application is denied and the denial reason "Insufficient credit history" is displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Insufficient credit history

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Request Loan page is open.
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Loan Amount field with type-specific ranges

test_cases.title: Reject when Loan Amount is below minimum for selected loan type
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields (Loan Amount set below the allowed minimum for the selected loan type, valid Down Payment less than Loan Amount, select Collateral Account with sufficient funds)
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the loan amount is outside the allowed range for the selected loan type.
test_cases.spec_evidence: System validates amount ranges

test_cases.title: Reject when Loan Amount exceeds maximum for selected loan type
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields (Loan Amount set above the allowed maximum for the selected loan type, valid Down Payment less than Loan Amount, select Collateral Account with sufficient funds)
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the loan amount is outside the allowed range for the selected loan type.
test_cases.spec_evidence: System validates amount ranges

test_cases.title: Reject when Down Payment is equal to or greater than Loan Amount
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields (Loan Amount set, Down Payment set equal to or greater than Loan Amount, select Collateral Account with sufficient funds)
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the Down Payment must be less than the Loan Amount.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Down payment < loan amount

test_cases.title: Reject when Down Payment is below 10% minimum requirement
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields (Loan Amount set within allowed range, Down Payment set below the 10% minimum, select Collateral Account with sufficient funds)
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the Down Payment does not meet the minimum percentage requirement.
test_cases.spec_evidence: 10% minimum down payment requirement

test_cases.title: Reject when collateral funds are insufficient relative to required collateral value
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields (Loan Amount set within allowed range, Down Payment meeting minimum percentage and less than Loan Amount, select Collateral Account with funds insufficient to meet collateral requirement)
test_cases.expected_result: Application is rejected or shows a validation/denial message such as "Inadequate collateral value."
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validates sufficient collateral funds

test_cases.title: Accept loan amount at minimum boundary (triggerable for: Personal, Auto, Home)
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields in the form (Loan Amount set to the minimum allowed for the selected loan type, Down Payment meeting minimum percentage and less than Loan Amount, select Collateral Account with sufficient funds)
test_cases.expected_result: Loan proceeds and, if approved by credit engine, displays "Loan approved and created successfully!" with account details.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Loan Amount field with type-specific ranges

test_cases.title: Accept Down Payment exactly at 10% minimum requirement
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields (Loan Amount set within allowed range, Down Payment set to exactly the 10% minimum, select Collateral Account with sufficient funds)
test_cases.expected_result: Loan proceeds to credit evaluation; if approved, displays "Loan approved and created successfully!" with account details.
test_cases.spec_evidence: 10% minimum down payment requirement

test_cases.title: Form displays pre-filled contact information
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Update Contact Info page is open
steps: Observe the values in all form fields (First Name, Last Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code, Phone Number)
test_cases.expected_result: All listed fields are populated with the user's existing contact information.

test_cases.title: Update profile with valid changes and save
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Update Contact Info page is open
steps: Modify one or more contact fields with valid values (First Name, Last Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code, Phone Number)
test_cases.expected_result: "Profile updated successfully." is displayed and the form refreshes to show the updated contact information.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Update Contact Info page is open
steps: Clear all required fields (First Name, Last Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code, Phone Number)
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields; invalid fields are highlighted and an inline error banner is displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: On validation failure: highlight invalid fields and display an inline error banner

test_cases.title: Submit with invalid ZIP Code format
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Update Contact Info page is open
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values except enter an invalid format for ZIP Code
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown for the ZIP Code field, the field is highlighted and an inline error banner is displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Submission triggers validation of each entry (format and completeness)

test_cases.title: Submit with invalid Phone Number format
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Update Contact Info page is open
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values except enter an invalid format for Phone Number
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown for the Phone Number field, the field is highlighted and an inline error banner is displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Submission triggers validation of each entry (format and completeness)

test_cases.title: Request a Debit card with valid account and complete shipping address
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Request Card page is open.
steps: Select an account that is in good standing to link
test_cases.expected_result: A card-request ticket is created and the UI shows "Card request submitted successfully." with a tracking ID.

test_cases.title: Request a Credit card with valid account and complete shipping address
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Request Card page is open.
steps: Select an account that is in good standing to link
test_cases.expected_result: A card-request ticket is created and the UI shows "Card request submitted successfully." with a tracking ID.

test_cases.title: Update card controls with valid limit, travel notice, and allowed status change
test_cases.preconditions: Manage Cards Update Controls page is open and at least one card exists.
steps: Fill all required fields (New Spending Limit with a valid amount within policy, Travel Notice with valid dates and destinations, Card Status to an allowed new value)
test_cases.expected_result: The message "Card controls updated successfully." is displayed and the card's spending limit, travel notice, and status reflect the submitted changes.

test_cases.title: Update only the spending limit with a valid amount
test_cases.preconditions: Manage Cards Update Controls page is open and at least one card exists.
steps: Fill New Spending Limit with a valid amount within policy
test_cases.expected_result: The message "Card controls updated successfully." is displayed and the card's spending limit is updated.

test_cases.title: Change card status to a valid new status
test_cases.preconditions: Manage Cards Update Controls page is open and at least one card exists.
steps: Set Card Status to a valid target status (e.g., change to Frozen if allowed for that card)
test_cases.expected_result: The message "Card controls updated successfully." is displayed and the card's status is updated accordingly.

test_cases.title: Add a travel notice with destination only (dates optional)
test_cases.preconditions: Manage Cards Update Controls page is open and at least one card exists.
steps: Fill Travel Notice with destination(s) only, leaving dates blank
test_cases.expected_result: The message "Card controls updated successfully." is displayed and the travel notice destination is recorded for the card.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Request Card page is open.
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system checks that the address is complete

test_cases.title: Submit with Account to Link empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Request Card page is open.
steps: Select a Card Type and fill a complete shipping address, leave Account to Link empty
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating an account must be selected or the request is rejected due to missing account selection.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system verifies the selected account’s standing

test_cases.title: Submit with Shipping Address empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Request Card page is open.
steps: Select a Card Type and select a valid account in good standing, leave Shipping Address empty
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the shipping address is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system checks that the address is complete

test_cases.title: Submit with incomplete shipping address
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Request Card page is open.
steps: Select a Card Type and select a valid account in good standing
Fill a shipping address that is missing required components
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the shipping address is incomplete and the request is not submitted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system checks that the address is complete

test_cases.title: Submit using an account that is not in good standing
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Request Card page is open.
steps: Select a Card Type and select an account that is flagged as not in good standing
test_cases.expected_result: Request is rejected with an error indicating the selected account cannot be used due to its standing.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system verifies the selected account’s standing

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: Manage Cards Update Controls page is open.
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields and the form remains editable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: appear inline, and the form stays editable

test_cases.title: Attempt to set a spending limit above policy
test_cases.preconditions: Manage Cards Update Controls page is open and at least one card exists.
steps: Fill New Spending Limit with an amount above the allowed policy
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error indicates the spending limit exceeds policy and the form remains editable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: A limit above policy causes validation failure

test_cases.title: Enter a travel notice with an invalid date range (end date before start date)
test_cases.preconditions: Manage Cards Update Controls page is open and at least one card exists.
steps: Fill Travel Notice with a start date and an end date where the end date is before the start date
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error indicates the date range is invalid and the form remains editable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Date ranges are validated

test_cases.title: Attempt a disallowed card-status transition
test_cases.preconditions: Manage Cards Update Controls page is open and a card exists whose current status prohibits the chosen new status.
steps: Select the card whose current status disallows the chosen transition
Set Card Status to the disallowed target status
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error indicates the status transition is not allowed and the form remains editable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Allowable card-status transitions are validated

test_cases.title: Set spending limit exactly at the policy maximum
test_cases.preconditions: Manage Cards Update Controls page is open and at least one card exists.
steps: Fill New Spending Limit with an amount equal to the policy maximum
test_cases.expected_result: The message "Card controls updated successfully." is displayed and the card's spending limit is updated to the policy maximum.
test_cases.spec_evidence: A limit above policy causes validation failure

test_cases.title: Add a single-day travel notice (start date equals end date)
test_cases.preconditions: Manage Cards Update Controls page is open and at least one card exists.
steps: Fill Travel Notice with start date and end date set to the same valid day and provide destination(s)
test_cases.expected_result: Either the travel notice is accepted and "Card controls updated successfully." is displayed or an inline validation error explains the date range issue, with the form remaining editable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Date ranges are validated

test_cases.title: Execute same-day Buy trade successfully
test_cases.preconditions: User has sufficient buying power and the fund symbol exists.
steps: Fill all required fields (Action = Buy, Fund Symbol with a valid existing symbol, Quantity with a positive number, select Funding Account)
test_cases.expected_result: Trade executed successfully with a same-day order; holdings and portfolio snapshot update and a confirmation displays "Trade executed successfully." with an order ID.

test_cases.title: Execute same-day Sell trade successfully
test_cases.preconditions: User holds sufficient shares of the specified fund and the fund symbol exists.
steps: Fill all required fields (Action = Sell, Fund Symbol with a valid existing symbol, Quantity less than or equal to held shares, select Destination Account)
test_cases.expected_result: Trade executed successfully with a same-day order; holdings and portfolio snapshot update and a confirmation displays "Trade executed successfully." with an order ID.

test_cases.title: Create recurring investment plan with Weekly frequency
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Create Recurring Investment Plan page
steps: Fill all required fields (Fund Symbol, Contribution Amount, Frequency set to Weekly, Start Date in the future, Funding Account with adequate balance)
test_cases.expected_result: Schedule is stored and confirmation message "Plan created successfully." is displayed.

test_cases.title: Create recurring investment plan with Monthly frequency
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Create Recurring Investment Plan page
steps: Fill all required fields (Fund Symbol, Contribution Amount, Frequency set to Monthly, Start Date in the future, Funding Account with adequate balance)
test_cases.expected_result: Schedule is stored and confirmation message "Plan created successfully." is displayed.

test_cases.title: Reject Buy when insufficient buying power
test_cases.preconditions: User does not have sufficient buying power for the requested purchase.
steps: Fill all required fields (Action = Buy, Fund Symbol with a valid existing symbol, Quantity that exceeds buying power, select Funding Account)
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error indicating insufficient buying power and the trade is not executed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The customer has sufficient buying power or share balance

test_cases.title: Reject Sell when requested quantity exceeds share balance
test_cases.preconditions: User does not hold sufficient shares of the specified fund.
steps: Fill all required fields (Action = Sell, Fund Symbol with a valid existing symbol, Quantity greater than current share balance, select Destination Account)
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error indicating insufficient share balance and the trade is not executed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The customer has sufficient buying power or share balance

test_cases.title: Portfolio snapshot is read-only and displays holdings details
test_cases.preconditions: Portfolio snapshot is visible on the Execute Trade page.
test_cases.expected_result: Portfolio snapshot is read-only and shows current fund holdings, market value, and unrealised gain or loss.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields (inline).
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validation failures appear inline

test_cases.title: Reject trade when Fund Symbol does not exist
test_cases.preconditions: All other required fields are filled with valid values.
steps: Fill all required fields (Action, Quantity, Funding/Destination Account) and enter a non-existent Fund Symbol
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicating the fund symbol is invalid or not found; trade is not executed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system checks that the symbol exists

test_cases.title: Reject trade when Quantity is zero or negative
test_cases.preconditions: All other required fields are filled with valid values.
steps: Fill all required fields (Action, Fund Symbol, Funding/Destination Account) and set Quantity to zero or a negative value
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicating quantity must be greater than zero and trade is not executed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Quantity is greater than zero

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Create Recurring Investment Plan page
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Errors highlight the problematic fields

test_cases.title: Submit with Start Date field empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Create Recurring Investment Plan page
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave Start Date empty
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the Start Date is required and highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The start date is in the future

test_cases.title: Submit with Contribution Amount field empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Create Recurring Investment Plan page
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave Contribution Amount empty
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the Contribution Amount is required and highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The contribution meets the minimum

test_cases.title: Submit with Funding Account field empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Create Recurring Investment Plan page
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave Funding Account empty
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the Funding Account is required and highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The funding account has adequate balance

test_cases.title: Reject plan when Start Date is not in the future
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Create Recurring Investment Plan page
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values, set Start Date to a past date
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown for Start Date (for example, "Start date must be in the future") and field is highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Start date must be in the future

test_cases.title: Reject plan when Contribution Amount is below minimum
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Create Recurring Investment Plan page
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values, set Contribution Amount below the minimum
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the Contribution Amount does not meet the minimum and the field is highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The contribution meets the minimum

test_cases.title: Reject plan when Funding Account has inadequate balance
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Create Recurring Investment Plan page
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values, select a Funding Account with insufficient balance
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the Funding Account has insufficient balance and the field is highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The funding account has adequate balance

test_cases.title: Reject plan when Start Date is today (not a future date)
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Create Recurring Investment Plan page
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values, set Start Date to today's date
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown indicating Start Date must be in the future and the field is highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The start date is in the future

test_cases.title: Generate statement for a selected account using month-and-year period
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Account Statements page.
steps: Select 'Statement Period' using the month-and-year option and choose a valid month and year
Select an account from the 'Account' dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Statement generated successfully and the transactions for the selected month are retrieved and displayed.

test_cases.title: Generate statement using a custom date range
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Account Statements page.
steps: Choose the custom date range option and fill both start and end dates within a valid interval
Select an account from the 'Account' dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Statement generated successfully and transactions within the selected date range are retrieved and displayed.

test_cases.title: Enable paperless statements with valid email
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Account Statements page is open.
steps: Check the paperless statements opt-in checkbox and fill a valid email address in the Email Address field
test_cases.expected_result: e-Statement preference updated.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Account Statements page.
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for required fields and statement is not generated.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates the dates

test_cases.title: Fail to generate statement when end date is before start date
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Account Statements page.
steps: Choose the custom date range option and set the end date earlier than the start date
Select an account from the 'Account' dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown indicating an invalid date range and statement is not generated.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates the dates

test_cases.title: Handle system failure during statement generation
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Account Statements page.
steps: Select a valid statement period (month-or custom range) and an account from the 'Account' dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: User is shown an error message and the statement is not produced.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Unable to generate statement — please try again later.

test_cases.title: Save preference with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Account Statements page is open.
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Failure highlights the email field with guidance

test_cases.title: Save preference with Email Address empty while opting into paperless
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Account Statements page is open.
steps: Check the paperless statements opt-in checkbox, leave Email Address empty
test_cases.expected_result: Email field highlighted with guidance and preference not saved.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Failure highlights the email field with guidance

test_cases.title: Save preference with invalid email format
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Account Statements page is open.
steps: Check the paperless statements opt-in checkbox and fill an invalid email address in the Email Address field
test_cases.expected_result: Email field highlighted with guidance and preference not saved.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates the email address

test_cases.title: Change password with valid current password and strong matching new password
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Security Settings panel is open
steps: Expand the Change Password collapsible panel if it is collapsed
Fill all required fields (Current Password, New Password, Confirm New Password) using the valid current password and a strong matching new password
test_cases.expected_result: Password changed successfully and credentials are updated.

test_cases.title: Change password fails with incorrect current password
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Security Settings panel is open
steps: Fill all required fields (Current Password, New Password, Confirm New Password) with an incorrect current password and a valid strong matching new password
test_cases.expected_result: Change is rejected and an error indicates the current password is incorrect.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system verifies the current password

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Security Settings panel is open
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields and the relevant fields are highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validation errors highlight the appropriate fields

test_cases.title: Change password fails when New Password and Confirm New Password do not match
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Security Settings panel is open
steps: Fill all required fields (Current Password, New Password, Confirm New Password) with a valid current password and non-matching new and confirm values
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown indicating the new password and confirmation must match and the mismatch fields are highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: New Password and Confirm New Password must match

test_cases.title: Change password fails when new password violates strong-password policy
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Security Settings panel is open
steps: Fill all required fields (Current Password, New Password, Confirm New Password) with a valid current password and a weak new password entered in both New and Confirm fields
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown indicating the new password does not meet the strong-password requirements and the New Password field is highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Enforces a strong-password policy

test_cases.title: Expand collapsible panel reveals Change Password form fields
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Security Settings panel is open
steps: Ensure the Change Password collapsible panel is collapsed
Expand the Change Password collapsible panel
Verify the form displays Current Password, New Password, Confirm New Password, and the "Change Password" button
test_cases.expected_result: Change Password form fields and button are visible when the collapsible panel is expanded.

test_cases.title: Send a support message with valid subject, category, message body, and attachment
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Support Center Send Message page.
steps: Fill all fields (valid Subject, select a Category, valid Message Body, attach a file of an allowed type)
test_cases.expected_result: “Message sent successfully.” is displayed and a ticket ID is shown.

test_cases.title: Send a support message without attachment (attachment optional)
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Support Center Send Message page.
steps: Fill all required fields (valid Subject, select a Category, valid Message Body), leave Attachment empty
test_cases.expected_result: “Message sent successfully.” is displayed and a ticket ID is shown.

test_cases.title: Schedule a callback with valid inputs
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Support Center Request Callback form.
steps: Fill all required fields (select Reason for Call, enter Preferred Date at least next business day, select Preferred Time Window, confirm or edit Phone Number) with valid values
test_cases.expected_result: The page shows "Callback request submitted." and a confirmation email is sent.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Support Center Send Message page.
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields and inline guidance is displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system ensures a message body is present

test_cases.title: Submit with invalid subject length
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Support Center Send Message page.
steps: Fill all other required fields (select a Category, valid Message Body), enter a Subject with invalid length
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation guidance indicating the subject length is invalid is shown.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system checks subject length

test_cases.title: Attach an unsupported file type and attempt to send
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Support Center Send Message page.
steps: Fill all required fields (valid Subject, select a Category, valid Message Body), attach a file of an unsupported type
test_cases.expected_result: Inline guidance indicating the attachment type is not allowed is shown and message is not sent.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Attachment types are validated

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Support Center Request Callback form.
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validation errors are shown inline

test_cases.title: Reject callback request for date earlier than next business day
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Support Center Request Callback form.
steps: Fill all required fields with a Preferred Date that is before the next business day and other fields valid
test_cases.expected_result: Submission is blocked and an inline validation error indicates the preferred date is invalid.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system ensures the date is at least the next business day

test_cases.title: Accept callback scheduled for the next business day boundary
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Support Center Request Callback form.
steps: Fill all required fields with Preferred Date equal to the next business day and other fields valid
test_cases.expected_result: The page shows "Callback request submitted." and a confirmation email is sent.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system ensures the date is at least the next business day
